full_prompt: Design a single-piece welded front lower A-arm (wishbone) for a student-built open-wheel race vehicle. Vehicle total mass (with driver) 300 kg; front axle sprung mass 130 kg; tire scrub radius 25 mm. The wishbone is a two-legged triangular tube weldment using 4130 chromoly tubing, front leg 19.05 mm (3/4 in) OD x 1.6 mm wall, rear leg identical; inboard pickup points are two spherical rod ends on M8 Grade 8.8 studs spaced 200 mm apart on the chassis; outboard is a single 40 mm diameter ball-joint cup that receives the upright ball joint. Material: AISI 4130 normalized steel, E = 205 GPa, yield = 460 MPa, ultimate = 670 MPa, density = 7850 kg/m^3. Overall plan dimensions: 350 mm inboard pivot axis length; 400 mm lateral span from chassis to outboard ball-joint. Load cases (reduced from vehicle mass x g x load factor): (R1) 3 g cornering: lateral load at ball-joint 3 x (130/2) kg x 9.81 = 1,913 N pushing outward; combined with 1 g vertical 65 x 9.81 = 638 N; max von Mises <= yield / 1.5 = 307 MPa. (R2) 2 g bump: vertical load 2 x 65 x 9.81 = 1,275 N upward at ball joint; max von Mises <= 307 MPa. (R3) 1.5 g braking (tractive load into wheel): longitudinal load at ball joint 1.5 x 65 x 9.81 = 956 N rearward, plus 1 g vertical 638 N; max von Mises <= 307 MPa. (R4) Curb-strike: 5 g lateral impulse 5 x 65 x 9.81 = 3,188 N at ball-joint; max von Mises <= ultimate / 1.5 = 447 MPa (ultimate load). (R5) Wishbone mass <= 600 g. (R6) Linear buckling eigenvalue under LC3 compressive leg load >= 3.0. Primary verification: structural FEA (linear static, 4 cases) + linear buckling. Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation explicitly NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 welded assembly, weld map, and a report listing wishbone mass in g, max von Mises per load case in MPa, first buckling load factor.
short_prompt:
Design a single-piece welded front lower A-arm (wishbone) for a student-built open-wheel race vehicle. Tubing is 4130 normalized chromoly, front and rear legs both 19.05 mm OD x 1.6 mm wall; inboard pickup points are two M8 Grade 8.8 spherical rod ends spaced 200 mm apart, outboard is a single 40 mm ball-joint cup receiving the upright ball joint. Vehicle total mass (with driver) 300 kg; front axle sprung mass 130 kg; tire scrub radius 25 mm.

Envelope: inboard pivot axis length 350 mm, lateral span chassis-to-ball-joint 400 mm.

Load cases.
- LC1 3 g cornering: 1,913 N lateral outward at the ball joint + 1 g vertical 638 N.
- LC2 2 g bump: 1,275 N vertical upward at the ball joint.
- LC3 1.5 g braking: 956 N rearward at the ball joint + 1 g vertical 638 N.
- LC4 curb-strike: 5 g lateral impulse 3,188 N at the ball joint (ultimate-load case).
- LC5 linear buckling under LC3 compressive leg load, eigenvalue >= 3.0.

prompt.title: Student race vehicle front lower A-arm
prompt.brief: 4130 chromoly wishbone, 3/4 in OD x 1.6 mm wall tube. Qualified under 3 g corner / 2 g bump / 1.5 g brake / 5 g curb.

boundary_conditions.mounting: two inboard M8 rod-end centers pinned (ball-joint style)
boundary_conditions.loads: applied at outboard ball-joint cup center
